transcript: This structure isn't from a sci-fi movie, it's real. The Rishat structure in the Sahara Desert is one of the most underrated wonders of the world. Stretching 50 kilometers across and being tens of millions of years old, this place in Mauritania is a must-see. Try to view it from space if you can.
